summary: Iteration 2 testing of CardVault new features (Quick Sell, time-range filter, charts, CSV import, purchased/sold dates) plus regressions. Backend: 26/26 pytest passed (15 new tests added). Frontend: full Playwright run on demo@example.com — time-range select switches stats correctly, charts render, Import CSV present, Add/Edit form has purchased/sold date inputs (sold disabled when status != sold), Quick Sell visible only on in_collection cards, modal computes projected profit live and submit flips card to Sold with toast.

issues: Recharts logs benign 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings during initial layout — non-blocking, charts render correctly after layout
A11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Add a DialogDescription for screen-reader compliance

action_items: Optional polish: add <DialogDescription> inside CardFormModal and QuickSellModal to silence Radix a11y warning
Optional polish: charts container shows brief width(-1) warning on first render — wrap recharts ResponsiveContainer in element with explicit min-height to avoid the log noise
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~700 lines and mixes auth + cards + storage + CSV import. Consider splitting into routers (auth_router.py, cards_router.py, files_router.py) for maintainability.

_card_doc merge path treats explicit None as 'do not change' (filters Nones), which is consistent for PUT but means a user can never clear sold_date by sending null. Acceptable for now but should be documented.
stats and timeseries each call db.cards.find().to_list(5000) — for users with many cards an aggregation pipeline ($match + $group by month) would scale better.
POST /api/cards/import has no row-count limit; very large CSVs could exhaust memory. Add max rows or stream via async iterator.
Dashboard.jsx loadStats effect depends on cards.length which can re-trigger redundant calls when cards array shrinks/grows; using refreshKey alone would be cleaner.
test_credentials: demo@example.com / demo1234 (already seeded, used for all auth-bound tests)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed cards and clean up after themselves. CSV import test created/deleted TEST_Import_* cards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified end-to-end. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers: auth (login/register/me/duplicate/invalid), cards CRUD, search/filter, export with new date columns, image upload+serve, user isolation, quick-sell (default + explicit date + 404), stats with since=30d/90d/1y/all, timeseries (12 + custom months, monthly+by_year shape), CSV import (happy path, underscore headers, invalid rows skipped, non-CSV rejection). Frontend Playwright verified: login, time-range select changes stats, recharts surface count=4 (2 charts × 2 axes), import-csv-button present, form-purchased-date-input + form-sold-date-input present with sold disabled, quick-sell-{id} only on in_collection, quick-sell-modal opens, quick-sell-projected-profit updates live, quick-sell-submit closes modal and flips status to Sold.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All listed iteration-2 features and regressions function as specified.
